brief_notes: Excellent logical structure progressing from architecture design through benchmarking, cross-species generalization, and optical data extension. Methods section is thorough with specific experimental details (solutions, concentrations, recording parameters). Tables clearly present architecture, workflow, and cross-preparation generalization results. Validation approach is multi-faceted (ROC, benchmarking, pharmacological controls, cross-species). Main weakness is that many citations appear to be placeholder self-citations (Bhatt2005-2023 series), and tables still use qualitative rather than fully quantitative entries in some cases.
